author: Author
cookie-consent:title: Cookie Preferences
cookie-consent:message: We use cookies, subject to your consent, to analyze the use of our website and to ensure you get the best experience. Third parties with whom we collaborate can also install cookies in order to show you personalized content. Read our
cookie-consent:essential-description: Strictly necessary cookies help make the website usable by enabling basic functions such as page navigation and access to secure areas.
cookie-consent:essential-details: Without these cookies, the website cannot function properly.
cookie-consent:analytics-details: Statistical cookies help us understand how visitors interact with the website by collecting and reporting information.
cookie-consent:analytics-third-party-det: Allows sharing statistical analytics data with external analytics providers.
cookie-consent:marketing-details: Marketing cookies are used to track visitors across websites so ads can be relevant and valuable for publishers and third-party advertisers.
cookie-consent:personalization-details: Personalization cookies remember your settings, like language or currency, so the site works the way you prefer.
